Commitment.title: Commitment
Commitment.description: A saved commitment that has been approved by the user

userId.description: The authenticated user UID who owns this commitment

approvedArtifact.description: The final approved draft or text

reasoningTrace.description: The reasoning trace explaining start-by, etc

sourceEmailId.description: Stable identifier of the source email (Gmail ID or fingerprint)

emailId.description: The stable Gmail message ID if caught from Gmail

subject.description: The subject of the source email

deadlineISO.description: ISO absolute datetime of the deadline

startByISO.description: ISO absolute datetime of backward-planned start-by

defended.description: Whether a Google Calendar event has been successfully created/defended

completed.description: Whether the commitment has been marked complete

completedAt.description: ISO absolute datetime when marked complete

googleDocUrl.description: The published Google Doc URL if created
